Game.Name: Pinball Dreams (USA)
Game.plot: The first in a line of pinball games from 21st Century and Digital Illusions, with four tables covering themes such as the wild west for Steel Wheel, space rockets for Ignition, a haunted graveyard for Nightmare and pop music for Beat Box. The portable versions for the Game Boy and Game Gear only have 3 of the 4 original tables with the removal of Beat Box.The iPhone version includes updated graphics (optional) and gameplay in both portrait and landscape orientation.Cheat: See the CreditsSelect any pinball game and play it. Once the ball appears and lands, exit back to the main menu. You'll be taken back to the main menu. Wait there and you'll be taken to the following screens: high scores, title screen, main menu, high scores. After that, you'll see the 21st. Century Entertainment logo and will then be taken to a Spidersoft screen with the game's staff.
